# HTML Template Styles Reference

## Corporate Style

- **Max width:** 900px
- **Primary:** #1a365d (dark navy)
- **Secondary:** #2b6cb0 (medium blue)
- **Accent:** #3182ce (bright blue)
- **Background:** #ffffff
- **Text:** #2d3748
- **Font stack:** 'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
- **Header:** Full-width gradient banner (primary → secondary)
- **Tables:** Blue header row, alternating light blue/white rows

## Academic Style

- **Max width:** 750px
- **Primary:** #1a202c (near black)
- **Secondary:** #4a5568 (gray)
- **Accent:** #744210 (brown)
- **Background:** #fafafa (off-white)
- **Text:** #1a202c
- **Font stack:** Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif
- **Header:** Centered title with horizontal rule
- **Tables:** Thin borders, no alternating colors

## Minimal Style

- **Max width:** 680px
- **Primary:** #111827 (near black)
- **Secondary:** #6b7280 (gray)
- **Accent:** #059669 (green)
- **Background:** #ffffff
- **Text:** #374151
- **Font stack:** 'Inter', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
- **Header:** Top-left aligned, no banner
- **Tables:** Borderless, subtle bottom borders only
